subject: Implement unit tests for input capture
description:
Create unit tests in main_test.go for input capture:

```go
func TestCaptureInput_Files(t *testing.T) {
    // Create temp files
    tmpDir := t.TempDir()
    file1 := filepath.Join(tmpDir, "a.go")
    file2 := filepath.Join(tmpDir, "b.go")
    os.WriteFile(file1, []byte("package a"), 0644)
    os.WriteFile(file2, []byte("package b"), 0644)

    input, err := CaptureInput([]string{file1, file2})
    require.NoError(t, err)
    assert.Contains(t, input, "package a")
    assert.Contains(t, input, "package b")
}

func TestCaptureInput_Empty(t *testing.T) {
    input, err := CaptureInput(nil)
    require.NoError(t, err)
    assert.Equal(t, "", input)
}

func TestCaptureInput_MissingFile(t *testing.T) {
    _, err := CaptureInput([]string{"/nonexistent/file.go"})
    require.Error(t, err)
}
```

Also test protocol loading and model mapping.
